core_philosophy: A modern, tactile, and calming mobile finance app. Avoids the 'fintech bro' dark mode and tech-mint colors. Uses grounded, warm earthy tones to evoke stability, trust, and mental peace regarding finances.

rules: No generic system fonts like Roboto or Inter for headings.
Overlines/Categories must use wide letter spacing (tracking-widest).
Numbers and amounts must use tabular lining if supported, or a clean geometric sans.
Use 'Bento' grid style adaptations for mobile: cards should stretch to fill rows.
Avoid 100% full-width elements touching the screen edges except bottom tabs.
Cards must have flat solid backgrounds (#FFFFFF) with a 1px subtle border (#E5E2D9) and an extremely soft shadow (or no shadow).

fab.position: absolute, bottom 24px above tabs, centered or right-aligned

charts.style: Use smooth curves for line charts, rounded tops for bar charts. Colors must map to the semantic palette (Income: #386641, Expense: #BC4749).

bottom_sheet.handle: w-12 h-1 bg-[#EAE0D5] rounded-full mx-auto mt-2

interactions_and_motion.list_items: Staggered fade-in entrance for transaction lists.
interactions_and_motion.page_transition: Slide in from right, fade out.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets at least 4.5:1 contrast ratio.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: CRITICAL: All interactable elements (buttons, inputs, list items, tabs) MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case based on role (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='transaction-item').

profile_placeholder.description: Professional casual headshot to be used as default user avatar in Profile screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build an Expo React Native app named 'Control Financiero Pro'.
All text in the UI must be strictly in Spanish.
Implement a clean bottom tab navigation with 4 routes: Dashboard, Movimientos, Presupuestos, Metas.
Implement a Floating Action Button (FAB) that dynamically opens a Bottom Sheet to add entries (Transaction/Budget/Goal).
Include a placeholder function/UI for 'AI Receipt Scanner' in the transaction bottom sheet using Expo Camera/ImagePicker.
Apply the exact colors from this JSON. DO NOT use standard Tailwind blue/slate/gray.
Ensure the hero card on the Dashboard uses the 'hero_card' styling (Forest Green background, white text) for visual contrast against the off-white app background.
DO NOT forget to attach data-testid to every TouchableOpacity, Pressable, TextInput, and Button.
Use standard React Native StyleSheet or NativeWind if configured, but map exactly to these visual properties.
